reason: Migrate Benin VAT to one reviewed local engine across English, French and Swahili. CGI Article 241 fixes the standard rate at 18%; the DGI VAT guide describes the zero-rate convention for taxable exports; Article 229 classification is confirmation-only; Article 228 delegates the current numeric registration threshold to ministerial order; and Article 259 requires the previous month's declaration and payment by the 10th. The change removes the unsupported XOF 50 million threshold, false 15th-day deadline, broad exemption certainty, generic withholding arithmetic and unconsented AI result-context submission while preserving deterministic two-decimal add, extract and invoice arithmetic. Six unit tests and five browser checks cover executable behavior; no protected golden fixture existed, so there is no carried result delta.
